text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second senior year obstacle is the G1 spring
Tenno Sho. If Kitasan Black performs well here,
then she's guaranteed to go down in history as a
force to be reckoned with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her determination makes Brusquement and Air
Groove take notice of her.
